def negative_environment_lookup_repeated_in_hot_path():
    rule_id = "environment_lookup_repeated_in_hot_path"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag hot functions that repeatedly read environment variables or global config values that do not change."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
